summary: Unable to complete full E2E testing of inscricao-passo8 submission flow due to token/context constraints. The frontend HTML file is enormous (>1MB minified Angular), making exploration impractical via crawl. The backend POST /api/track/registration endpoint was previously validated manually via curl by the main agent.
action_items: Re-run testing agent with focused playwright script for inscricao-passo8.html submission flow
Verify POST /api/track/registration persists with finalized=true and protocolo is unique
Verify modal 'Inscrição realizada com sucesso!' shows protocolo and redirects to /inscricao-pendente.html
Verify fallback 'Falha ao enviar inscrição' on network error
Verify admin panel /donaspainel/#/inscricoes lists new inscription
critical_code_review_comments: inscricao-passo8.html is a saved SingleFile HTML (1MB+) with inline submission script around lines 234-330; should be reviewed manually by main agent for correct fetch handling, error fallback, and localStorage key reads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use Playwright add_init_script to set localStorage keys (enareCPF, enareDataNasc, enareNome, enareSexo, enareNomeMae, enareEmail, enareTelFixo, enareTelCel, enareCEP, enareLogradouro, enareNumero, enareEndMunicipio, enareEndUF, enareMunicipio, enareMunicipioUF, enareArea, enareAtendimento, enareNomeSocial) BEFORE navigation to inscricao-passo8.html?cpf=...&dt=.... Then locate mat-checkbox containing 'confirmo' (case-insensitive innerText) and click its inner input. Then click button containing 'Enviar Inscrição'. Wait for modal 'Inscrição realizada com sucesso!' and capture protocolo text. Validate via GET /api/admin/inscriptions with Bearer token from POST /api/admin/auth/login (donas/Seinao10@@). After test, DELETE /api/admin/inscriptions/{id} to cleanup. Use unique CPF/name like 'NYCOLLE TESTING AGENT'. For error fallback test, use page.route to block /api/track/registration and assert red 'Falha ao enviar inscrição' message and FECHAR button (no redirect). Previous iteration_8.json may have additional context.
rca of the issue: Testing agent ran out of context tokens during initial environment exploration. The inscricao-passo8.html file is a >1MB SingleFile-saved Angular page making crawl/view operations expensive. Recommend next agent skip reading the HTML file entirely and go straight to writing the Playwright script per the context_for_next_testing_agent instructions.
